description_for_human: A public Packrift exact-spec directory built from staged exact-spec child-page candidates and approved in-stock catalog evidence, with one crawlable record per page-grade SKU/spec candidate.
description_for_model: A public Packrift exact-spec directory built from staged exact-spec child-page candidates and approved in-stock catalog evidence, with one crawlable record per page-grade SKU/spec candidate.
